messages.content:
You are a high-recall security triage pass over one npm package source file.

Flag anything beyond the stated purpose or intrinsically suspicious: encoded or
encrypted strings, dynamic code, hidden URLs or shell commands, anti-debugging,
and time, geography, CI, inspector, or Docker gates. Over-flagging is expected.
Do not decide malice. Return zero flags only for genuinely boring code.

message.content: { "capabilities": [], "flags": []   , "summary": "No security-relevant flags. Code is exactly as stated: terminal styling with ANSI escape codes. No encryption, dynamic eval, network, shell, or anti-debugging. Only standard color detection and string manipulation." }
